top_signals.title: SCOTUS to trigger truckload rate run to $5.00 per mile?
top_signals.summary:
Spot rates hit $3.55 a mile yesterday — a clear signal that capacity is not flowing in to relieve the tightness we saw during road check week. And we’re heading into Memorial Day, which historically creates a surge as shippers push product out ahead of the holiday and carriers take time off with their families. […]

The post SCOTUS to trigger truckload rate run to $5.00 per mile? appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Zcash Foundation ends Q1 with $36.69M in liquid assets and operating expenses of $817K
top_signals.summary: Zcash Foundation Q1 operating expenses came in at about $817,000, with team compensation as the largest category.
